MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANDREW LENNON'S Petition to Compel Arbitration. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition is denied. Van Winkle did not consent to or ratify the original arbitration agreement that petitioner wants enforced. The court acquired jurisdiction when defendant was served with the underlying complaint before the letter was issued by JAMS.
